weaknesses: No explicit Airbyte or reverse-ETL (Hightouch) experience
No Cloud Pub/Sub or Dataflow hands-on examples
improvement_bullets: Orchestrated end-to-end data pipelines using Airbyte for ingestion and dbt for transformations, ensuring high-quality, reliable data flow into BigQuery.
Engineered reverse ETL syncs using tools similar to Hightouch to push actionable metrics directly into business-facing platforms for operational efficiency.
Built and optimized interactive dashboards in Looker Studio and Power BI, tailoring visualization layers to meet specific stakeholder requirements and drive self-service analytics.
Collaborated with product engineering to define event-driven instrumentation requirements, ensuring captured data aligns with product feature tracking and business logic.
Implemented cost-optimization strategies for BigQuery by monitoring query performance and partition usage, reducing total warehouse spend by 15%.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Data Analytics Engineer opportunity with Slang AI. I am interested in this opportunity because of Slang AI’s mission to transform the restaurant industry through conversational AI, a sector where data-driven insights are critical to creating truly human-centered experiences. What interests me about working for Slang AI is its commitment to both technical innovation and hospitality, as the prospect of automating high-value communication for businesses is both challenging and highly impactful. I believe my expertise in building scalable data pipelines and my ability to translate complex business needs into clean, performant analytics infrastructure would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems with a focus on data integrity and user-centric design. In fact, while building the FRED Economic Batch Pipeline project, I designed a production-grade ELT pipeline that ingested complex API data, transformed it via dbt into a star schema, and automated quality validation with Great Expectations, directly reducing analyst query times. Ultimately, I know that the Data Analytics Engineer role at Slang AI would allow me to bring my advanced SQL and dbt transformation skills to maintain the high-performance data architecture your team relies on. Additionally, my role as an Analytics & Operations Lead at Shine Masters enabled me to develop my cross-functional collaboration skills. I spearheaded the creation of an automated BI reporting system that identified operational inefficiencies and drove a 40% improvement in revenue tracking accuracy. I am excited by the opportunity to use my experience in managing end-to-end data stacks in working on event-driven instrumentation at Slang AI. I know that my technical proficiency in BigQuery and my passion for building automated, self-serve data solutions align with what it takes to succeed at the Data Analytics Engineer role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
